a.class: btn btn-caqa-primary rounded-pill px-4 fw-bold shadow-sm

div.p: Your institution has no programs registered yet.

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm h-100 rounded-3 overflow-hidden caqa-record-card

span.class: badge bg-white text-caqa-primary rounded-pill px-2 py-1 small mb-1

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill shadow-sm #{'bg-warning text-dark' if program.state == 'draft' else 'bg-success text-white' if program.state == 'active' else 'bg-secondary'}

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between small fw-bold text-muted mb-1
card-footer bg-white border-top-0 pt-0 pb-3 px-3 text-end

div.p: Fill in the details to register a new academic program.

div.class: d-flex gap-3 justify-content-end mt-4 pt-3 border-top

button.class: btn btn-caqa-primary rounded-pill px-5 fw-bold shadow-sm

a.class: d-flex align-items-center gap-2 text-muted small fw-bold text-decoration-none hover-primary

div.class: small text-muted fw-bold text-uppercase mb-2 px-1

ol.class: breadcrumb bg-white shadow-sm px-3 py-2 rounded

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm mb-4 rounded-3 overflow-hidden

span.class: badge bg-white text-caqa-primary mb-2 shadow-sm rounded-pill px-3 py-1

span.t-attf-class: badge #{'bg-warning text-dark' if program.state == 'draft' else 'bg-success text-white'} shadow-sm px-4 py-2 rounded-pill fs-6 fw-bold mt-2 mt-md-0

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between small fw-bold text-muted mb-2
alert alert-info border-0 rounded-3 mb-0 d-flex align-items-center gap-2
div.span: Draft Mode: You can edit this program. Changes are only visible to your institution.

div.class: alert alert-warning border-0 rounded-3 mb-0 d-flex align-items-center gap-2
div.span: Locked: This program is active. Contact your Accreditation Manager to request changes.

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-3 overflow-hidden mb-4
card-header bg-white border-bottom py-3 px-4 d-flex align-items-center gap-2

button.class: btn btn-caqa-primary rounded-pill px-5 fw-bold shadow-sm

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-3 overflow-hidden mb-4
card-header bg-white border-bottom py-3 px-4 d-flex align-items-center gap-2

button.class: btn btn-caqa-primary rounded-pill px-5 fw-bold shadow-sm

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-3 overflow-hidden mb-4
card-header bg-white border-bottom py-3 px-4 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center
card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-3 overflow-hidden mb-5
card-header bg-white border-bottom py-3 px-4 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill #{'bg-primary' if lo.outcome_type == 'knowledge' else 'bg-success' if lo.outcome_type == 'skill' else 'bg-info'} text-white
